Arkan_Veyr.description: Young ambitious engineer trying to make machines learn instead of follow rigid rules
Arkan_Veyr.external_goal: Create a Construct that can truly speak and understand
Arkan_Veyr.internal_need: Accept that control and perfection are impossible
Arkan_Veyr.core_conflict: Believes systems should adapt rather than obey rigid rules

Elohm_Construct.description: A learning machine that gathers language patterns from the Archive and gradually learns to speak
Elohm_Construct.nature: artificial intelligence made of magical runes and resonance

Maelin.description: Patient guardian of the Archive who understands history better than anyone
Maelin.external_goal: Preserve the knowledge of the city

Serah_Kade.description: Warns about the dangers of the Construct long before others see them
Serah_Kade.external_goal: Ensure the Construct does not harm the city

Circle_of_Judges.description: Council responsible for teaching the Construct right and wrong
Circle_of_Judges.conflict: Disagree on how intelligence should behave
